decisions.reason: Deng et al. (2024) meta-analysis on ChatGPT and student learning. Bartos et al. (2026) meta-meta-analysis covers this layer; defer in favor of the higher-aggregation source.

Re-promoted from SKIP to DEFER per user feedback (corroborating sources strengthen the KB). Deng et al. (2024) — meta-analysis of ChatGPT and student learning. Even though Bartos (2026) provides a meta-meta layer, this meta-analysis remains valuable as primary aggregation evidence at its own layer. Defer for selective integration.
